_metadata.description: PatentOps Platform Control Inventory — adapted from Assurance Ledger SOC1/ISQM1 framework

controls.control_statement: User authentication requires valid JWT token with tenant context. All API requests are authenticated and authorized against RBAC role matrix.
controls.purpose: Prevent unauthorized access to patent case data and ensure tenant isolation.
controls.population_definition: All API requests during audit period
controls.failure_criteria: Request processed without valid JWT or with incorrect tenant scope

controls.control_statement: Role-based access control enforces that only authorized roles can perform state transitions. Only reviewer or partner roles can mark artifacts as FINAL.
controls.purpose: Enforce liability boundaries — AI drafts cannot bypass human approval.
controls.population_definition: All state transition events during audit period
controls.failure_criteria: State transition to FINAL performed by unauthorized role

controls.control_statement: All events are append-only with SHA-256 hash chain. No UPDATE or DELETE operations on event store.
controls.purpose: Ensure evidence integrity and tamper detection for patent prosecution records.
controls.population_definition: All events in event store during audit period
controls.failure_criteria: Hash chain break detected or mutation log entry found

controls.control_statement: Filed documents have SHA-256 content hash recorded in event ledger at time of filing.
controls.purpose: Enable verification that filed documents have not been altered post-filing.
controls.population_definition: All documents filed during audit period
controls.failure_criteria: Content hash mismatch between filed document and ledger record

controls.control_statement: AI-generated content is always watermarked as DRAFT and requires human review before any state transition to FINAL or FILED.
controls.purpose: Prevent AI hallucinations from reaching filed patent documents without human oversight.
controls.population_definition: All AI draft creation events and their subsequent approval chain
controls.sample_unit: AI draft → human review → approval event chain
controls.failure_criteria: AI draft reaching FILED status without intervening human review event

controls.control_statement: All claim amendments preserve full diff history with previous text, new text, and amendment reason.
controls.purpose: Maintain amendment lineage for prosecution history estoppel tracking.
controls.population_definition: All claim amendments during audit period
controls.failure_criteria: Amendment event missing previous_text, new_text, or diff field

controls.control_statement: Deadline Engine performs sweep checks at configured intervals and sends escalation notifications at defined thresholds (30, 14, 7, 3, 1 days).
controls.purpose: Prevent missed patent deadlines which can result in irrecoverable loss of patent rights.
controls.population_definition: All active deadlines during audit period
controls.failure_criteria: Deadline missed without prior warning events at expected thresholds

controls.control_statement: Conflict of interest check is automatically initiated at case INTAKE. Case cannot proceed to DRAFTING without completed conflict check.
controls.purpose: Prevent professional ethics violations from accepting conflicting client representations.
controls.population_definition: All cases created during audit period
controls.sample_unit: Individual case INTAKE → conflict check → DRAFTING transition
controls.failure_criteria: Case transitioned to DRAFTING without completed CONFLICT_CHECK_COMPLETED event

controls.control_statement: Missed deadlines automatically generate incident records with full audit trail and stakeholder notification.
controls.purpose: Ensure prompt response to missed deadlines and documented incident management.
controls.population_definition: All missed deadline events during audit period
controls.sample_unit: Individual DEADLINE_MISSED event and corresponding incident record
controls.failure_criteria: DEADLINE_MISSED event without corresponding incident record

controls.control_statement: Multi-tenant data isolation enforced via PostgreSQL Row-Level Security. All queries scoped by tenant_id.
controls.purpose: Prevent cross-tenant data access which would breach client confidentiality.
controls.population_definition: All database queries during audit period
controls.failure_criteria: Query executed without tenant_id filter or RLS bypass detected
